header.title: Knowledge
header.description: Manage FAQs, documents, and preview conversations.

manager.title: Knowledge Base
manager.description: Add FAQs and documents the receptionist can use across preview, SMS, and the voice snapshot refresh.

placeholders.faqContent: Yes, if there is open capacity. The receptionist should check availability before confirming.
placeholders.documentBody: Patients should arrive 10 minutes early. Bring photo ID and insurance information when applicable.

preview.title: Preview Receptionist
preview.description: Test the same business context layer used for SMS and async AI flows before you put it in front of callers.
preview.promptPlaceholder: What time are you open tomorrow?
preview.emptyResponse: Preview responses will appear here after you run the receptionist.
preview.disabled: Sign in and create a business to run the real preview flow.
